title: Senior Teacher - Manipal University - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Manipal University - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Manipal University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About Manipal University:
Manipal University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal University!
